Class ScaleOutTrancheConfig

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.algo.strategy.model.complex.profit.ScaleOutTrancheConfig
public class ScaleOutTrancheConfig extends Object
A single tranche in the scale-out plan: defines when to sell a fraction of the position.
